zh.lifeSummary: 當John Childe於1488年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安時，他的父親Thomas Childe21歲，母親Alice23歲。他於大約1510年與Agnes在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1544年12月4日在他的家鄉享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Childe于1488年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安时，他的父亲Thomas Childe21岁，母亲Alice23岁。他于大约1510年与Agnes在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1544年12月4日在他的家乡享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。

nameMeanings.name: Childe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Child
meanings: nickname from Middle English child ‘child, infant’ (Old English cild), in various possible applications. The word is found in Old English as a byname, and in Middle English as a widely used affectionate term of address. It was also used as a term of status for a young man of noble birth, although the exact meaning is not clear; in the 13th and 14th centuries it was a technical term used of a young noble awaiting elevation to the knighthood. In other cases it may have been applied as a byname to a youth considerably younger than his brothers or to one who was a minor on the death of his father.
in Kent, possibly a topographic name from Old English cielde ‘spring (water)’, a rare word derived from c(e)ald ‘cold’.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John Childe was born in 1488, in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Thomas Childe, was 21 and his mother, Alice, was 23. He married Agnes about 1510, in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 4 December 1544, in his hometown, at the age of 56, and was buried in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Childe est né en 1488, à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Childe, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Alice, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Agnes environ 1510, à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 4 décembre 1544, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Childe 1488 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Childe 21 und seine Mutter Alice 23. Er hat um 1510 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Dezember 1544 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Childe è nato il nel 1488 nel Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Childe, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Alice, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Agnes circa 1510, nel Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 4 dicembre 1544, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Childeが1488年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムで生まれた時，父Thomas Childeは21歳，母Aliceは23歳であった。約1510年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムでAgnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1544年12月4日に故郷で56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Childe(이)가 1488년 영국 벅잉함실르 어머샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Childe(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 어머샤에서 Agnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1544년 12월 4일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 어머샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Childe nasceu em 1488, em Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Childe, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Alice, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes aproximadamente 1510, em Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de dezembro de 1544, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Childe родился в 1488 г. в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Childe было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Alice, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes около 1510 г. в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 4 декабря 1544 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Childe nació en 1488, en Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Childe, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Alice, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Agnes aproximadamente 1510, en Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 4 de diciembre de 1544, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
